Operation 'createtransaction' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lists supported payment methods but lacks information about authentication requirements (private API key), what is returned (transaction object with ID and status), and side effects (transaction is processed and can be tracked). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Creates a new payment transaction. Supports multiple payment method types including CARD, NEQUI, PSE, BANCOLOMBIA_TRANSFER, BANCOLOMBIA_QR, BANCOLOMBIA_COLLECT, PCOL, BANCOLOMBIA_BNPL, DAVIPLATA, and SU_PLUS.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new payment transaction with support for multiple payment methods (CARD, NEQUI, PSE, BANCOLOMBIA_TRANSFER, BANCOLOMBIA_QR, BANCOLOMBIA_COLLECT, PCOL, BANCOLOMBIA_BNPL, DAVIPLATA, SU_PLUS). Requires private API key authentication. Returns a transaction object with status, ID, and payment details. The transaction is immediately processed and its status can be monitored via the transaction ID.
data.reasoning: Description lists supported payment methods but lacks information about authentication requirements (private API key), what is returned (transaction object with ID and status), and side effects (transaction is processed and can be tracked). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'gettransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Added clarity about the required transaction_id parameter, authentication requirement (private API key), what fields are returned in the response, and use cases (monitoring progress or retrieving historical data). This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieves the current status and details of a transaction.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status and complete details of a specific transaction. Requires the transaction ID as a path parameter and private API key authentication. Returns the full transaction object including payment method, amount, status, timestamps, and customer information. Use this to monitor transaction progress or retrieve historical transaction data.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs.
